{{Quote|I've always wanted a lizard-skin gown. Full length, and only seamless will do, or it's not authentic.|Feebee Desnand on Bossk|<ref name="The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk">{{StoryCite|story=The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}</ref>}}
'''Feebee Desnand''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the wife of [[Io Desnand]], who served as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Aida]].

==Biography==
A plump woman who wore false [[Eye/Legends|eyelashes]], Feebee had been promised a lizard-skin gown by her husband. He planned to make good on his promise by skinning [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] alive, but Bossk escaped from [[Prison/Legends|prison]] before the skinning could take place.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
